text.title: AI Plugin Ecosystem (Figma REST) Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding the ai-plugin-ecosystem methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check + sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Unattended pipelines MUST use Figma REST API, not plugins.
rule.rationale: Plugins require a human at the keyboard; pipelines cannot retry / schedule.

rule.statement: Client MUST respect Figma rate limits (60 req/min/user) with retry-after handling.
rule.rationale: Hammering the API gets the org banned.

rule.statement: If the operation requires writes Figma REST cannot perform, the operation MUST be marked unsupported and routed to a plugin path.
Any write call (comments, version pin, file copy) MUST emit an audit log entry with actor + ts + diff.
rule.rationale: Without audit trail, broken Figma states cannot be traced.

rule.statement: PAT scope MUST be the minimum needed; org-wide tokens for single-file ops are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Broad PATs are the most-stolen secret in design ops.

rule.statement: When preconditions hold, run the full procedure end-to-end and emit the output artefact.
rule.rationale: Routes positive decision-tree leaves to the procedure.

rule.statement: When preconditions fail or skip-conditions hold, exit without producing the artefact and document why.
rule.rationale: Routes negative decision-tree leaves out without polluting the output channel.
